Comments and agent revisions

Comments keep stable record and field anchors plus selected-text context.

Agent authority: risk-based. Meaning-preserving corrections may be applied; material discovery changes require a proposal.

problem-hypothesis · problem-001 · difficulty

Existing deployment state requires developer interpretation

This may be too broad. We only observed this when CI and runtime state disagreed.
